customers.name: customers
customers.description: Customer master data with segmentation and regional attributes

columns.name: segment
columns.description: Customer segment classification (e.g., Enterprise, SMB, Consumer)

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when customer record was created

orders.name: orders
orders.description: Sales order headers with status tracking and channel attribution

columns.name: order_date
columns.description: Date and time when the order was placed

columns.name: status
columns.description: Order status (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, cancelled)

columns.name: total_amount
columns.description: Total monetary value of the order

columns.name: discount
columns.description: Discount amount applied to the order

columns.name: channel
columns.description: Sales channel through which the order was placed (e.g., web, mobile, in-store)

order_items.name: order_items
order_items.description: Individual line items within an order linking products to orders with quantities and pricing

columns.name: unit_price
columns.description: Price per unit at time of purchase

columns.name: line_total
columns.description: Computed total for this line item (quantity * unit_price)

products.name: products
products.description: Product catalog with categorization, branding, and pricing information

columns.name: list_price
columns.description: Retail list price shown to customers

campaigns.name: campaigns
campaigns.description: Marketing campaigns with budget allocation, channel targeting, and date ranges

columns.name: channel
columns.description: Marketing channel (e.g., email, social, search, display)

columns.name: budget
columns.description: Total allocated budget for the campaign

campaign_conversions.name: campaign_conversions
campaign_conversions.description: Conversion events linking campaigns to customers and orders for attribution tracking

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Foreign key to orders table (null if conversion did not result in order)

columns.name: conversion_date
columns.description: Date and time when the conversion occurred

support_tickets.name: support_tickets
support_tickets.description: Customer support tickets with priority, categorization, and resolution tracking

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Foreign key to related order (null if not order-related)

columns.name: category
columns.description: Ticket category (e.g., billing, shipping, product, technical)

columns.name: priority
columns.description: Ticket priority level (low, medium, high, critical)

columns.name: resolved_at
columns.description: Timestamp when ticket was resolved (null if still open)
